rows.notes: H43 should interpret R44 explicitly and refreeze the stack without inventing a broader runtime successor.
The post-R44 freeze is only justified if exact useful-case evidence is real, exact R43 remains decisive, model evidence remains non-substitutive, and merge posture stays operational.
The repo should clearly move from H42-authorizes-R44 to H43-refreezes-R44 as completed narrow useful-case evidence.
The public control surfaces should agree that H43 is current and that R44 is completed rather than merely next.
